title: Confidence Interval Construction Flow
description: A visual guide showing the step-by-step process of constructing a confidence interval to estimate a population parameter.
relationships: Sample Data is used to calculate the Point Estimate
Point Estimate and Sample Standard Deviation are used to calculate the Standard Error
Standard Error is multiplied by the Critical Value (based on confidence level) to get the Margin of Error
Margin of Error is added/subtracted from the Point Estimate to form the Confidence Interval
